mapper.sql: rdp_apply_code_info.id id, rdp_apply_code_info.gmt_create gmt_create, rdp_apply_code_info.gmt_modified gmt_modified, rdp_apply_code_info.report_time report_time, rdp_apply_code_info.cluster_ip cluster_ip, rdp_apply_code_info.cluster_mac_address cluster_mac_address, rdp_apply_code_info.cluster_hardware_uuid cluster_hardware_uuid, rdp_apply_code_info.info info, rdp_apply_code_info.apply_type apply_type
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM rdp_apply_code_info WHERE apply_type = 'CloudCanal' AND rdp_apply_code_info.cluster_ip = #{clusterIp} AND rdp_apply_code_info.cluster_mac_address = #{clusterMacAddress} AND rdp_apply_code_info.cluster_hardware_uuid = #{clusterHardwareUuid}

SELECT
FROM rdp_apply_code_info WHERE apply_type = 'CloudDM' AND rdp_apply_code_info.cluster_ip = #{clusterIp} AND rdp_apply_code_info.cluster_hardware_uuid = #{clusterHardwareUuid}
